hero.tagline: Your children's health, in caring hands
hero.subtitle: Pediatrician in Inezgane, dedicated to children's health and well-being.

presentation.title: Your trusted pediatrician in Inezgane
presentation.body:
Dr. Guinane Aicha is a pediatrician graduated from the Faculty of Medicine of Casablanca, with over 10 years of experience caring for children from birth to adolescence. Based in Inezgane, she supports families in the Souss-Massa region with attentive, compassionate medicine.

Believing that every child is unique, she adapts her approach to each situation, always taking time to explain and reassure both parents and children.
presentation.languages: Consultations in French, Arabic, Darija and Tamazight
